title: bredemeyera brevifolia
intro: Bredemeyera brevifolia, also known as the small leaf bredemeyera, is a plant species native to Australia, belonging to the family Rutaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which contribute to its ability to aid in wound healing and reduce pain. The health benefits associated with Bredemeyera brevifolia include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. Herbal preparations of the plant include tea and tincture, which can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or a solvent, such as ethanol, to create a medicinal extract.
